name: LDL Cholesterol Test Codes
description: CPT and LOINC codes for LDL (low-density lipoprotein) cholesterol laboratory tests including direct measurement and calculated values. Used in statin therapy for patients with cardiovascular disease (SPC) and related lipid management quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Lipid panel (includes LDL cholesterol as component)
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by calculation
LDL Cholesterol [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Electrophoresis
LDL Cholesterol [Mass or Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma by calculation
LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay — enzymatic method
